---
title: "Mitesh Kumar"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/mitesh-kumar0707
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/yourusername
---

MSc Data Science student in Germany specializing in predictive modeling and natural language processing. 

## Featured Projects
* [Predicting European Housing Prices](projects/housing.ipynb)
* [Customer Churn Analysis](projects/churn.qmd)
This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
